description: Mode C — Prompt-workshop iteration (DISC-26 resolution path). For prompt-corpus rewrite work — closing the 11 named gaps in the wizard-v2 coverage + prompt-quality audit. Per-spec loop: edit snippet at `prompt-workshop/snippets/<NN>-<spec-key>.md` (or the shared preamble at `prompt-workshop/shared/preamble.md` for all-14 uplift) → orchestrator runs `python prompt-workshop/dispatch/render.py SPEC_KEY` → captures the rendered prompt → dispatches a sub-agent (Agent tool, opus model) with the rendered prompt → captures the agent's response JSON → orchestrator runs `python prompt-workshop/dispatch/apply.py SPEC_KEY` (validates response via the production `parse_*` parser in `planner/specs.py` per DEC-41 workshop-production framing, merges into `prompt-workshop/outputs/current-draft.json`) → reads output + judges → tunes. When per-spec snippets read well, run the whole-plan sequence via `python prompt-workshop/dispatch/sequence.py` and judge the assembled draft. When the whole sequence produces an acceptable draft, the snippet bodies become the rewrite spec for a production `ai/0018+` PromptTemplate-evolution migration (the `ai/0016` guarded byte-match pattern). Per DEC-41 the workshop IS the development-time mode of the same Django production system — bugs fixed in workshop are production fixes; the orchestration trio US-LLM-23/24/25 is the production-side realization of this loop.
